zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret De Briwere於1172年出生在英國英格蘭戴文斯托克時，她的父親William de Briwere II27歲，母親Beatrice de Vaux23歲。她於大約1189年與William de la Ferte在英國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1237年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾肯普斯福德享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Briwere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Pierre, Adrien, Aurele, Benedicte, Benoit, Colette, Fernand, Gaston, Marcel, Micheline.

French (Brière): topographic name from a regional variant of Old French bruiere ‘heather’ (see Bruyere ), or a habitational name from La Brière, the name of several places mainly in the northern part of France, from the same word.
History: Jean Brière from Clarbec in Calvados, France, married Jeanne Grandin in Quebec City, QC, in 1671.

variants.name: Bruyere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Fernand, Jacques, Marcel.

French (Bruyère): from Old French bruiere ‘heather’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived in a place where heather grew, or a habitational name from one of the places in France (for example in Calvados) named with this word. Compare Labruyere .
Altered form (Bruyère) of French Bruguier: habitational name from (Le) Bruguier, the name of several places in the southeastern part of France, a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret De Briwere was born in 1172, in Stoke, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Briwere II, was 27 and her mother, Beatrice de Vaux, was 23. She married William de la Ferte about 1189, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1237, in Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret De Briwere est née en 1172, à Stoke, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Briwere II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Vaux, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé William de la Ferte environ 1189, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1237, à Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret De Briwereが1172年にイギリスイギリスデボンストクで生まれた時，父William de Briwere IIは27歳，母Beatrice de Vauxは23歳であった。約1189年にイギリスでWilliam de la Ferteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1237年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアケンプスフォードで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret De Briwere(이)가 1172년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 스토크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Briwere II(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice de Vaux(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1189년 영국에서 William de la Ferte(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1237년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 케프스퍼드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret De Briwere nasceu em 1172, em Stoke, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Briwere II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice de Vaux, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com William de la Ferte aproximadamente 1189, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1237, em Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret De Briwere родилась в 1172 г. в местности сток, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Briwere II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Vaux, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de la Ferte около 1189 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1237 г. в местности кемпсфорд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.
